title: xanthophyllum ramiflorum
intro: Xanthophyllum ramiflorum, also known as the 'pulai' or 'pule', is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Xanthophyllum ramiflorum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine for various purposes. The health benefits of consuming or using this plant include relief from fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Xanthophyllum ramiflorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
